questionHtml:
Which property of elements increases down a group but decreases across a period?


A.  Atomic radius

B.  Electronegativity

C.  Ionic radius

D.  Ionization energy

meta.title: Which property of elements increases down a group but decreases across a period? A. Atomic radius B. Electronegativity C. Ionic radius D. Ionization energy
